name: Cinnabon Cinnamon Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ingredients in machine following the specifications of that particular machine.
2. Set for dough cycle (about 1 hr. 40 minutes in my Hitachi B101).
3. After complete on dough cycle, remove from machine and roll out to a 17 x 10 inch rectangle.
4. Filling:
- Mix together brown sugar and cinnamon.
- Spread softened butter over the dough.
- Sprinkle brown sugar and cinnamon mixture over the top.
- Roll tightly from the long end, pinching edges closed when completely rolled.
5. Slice the rolled dough into 1/2 inch slices (or larger if a larger bun is preferred). Place into greased cake pans (I use 3 - 9 inch pans).
6. Let rise until doubled.
7. Bake at 350°F for 15 - 20 minutes, until golden. Do not overbake.
Frosting:
- Mix together 4 oz cream cheese, 1/4 cup butter, 1 1/2 cups confectioners sugar, 1/2 teaspoon vanilla, and about 3 tablespoons milk.
- Spread on very warm rolls. They are best when eaten fresh, but can be rejuvenated by placing in the microwave for 10 - 15 seconds.
